name: Notice.AAA6.DefResponse.JR.Cancelled.Claimant
titleCy: Mae’r CCJ wedi cael ei ganslo.
descriptionEn: The defendant has now submitted a response. The CCJ you requested has been cancelled.
descriptionCy: Mae’r diffynnydd bellach wedi cyflwyno ymateb. Mae’r CCJ y gwnaethoch ei ofyn amdano wedi cael ei ganslo.
